description_long: This bungalow is a modern, two-story residential building surrounded by a variety of trees, including both leafy green and flowering types. The structure features a flat roof with a small rooftop section, large windows on both floors, and a prominent front entrance. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark gray tones, with a sleek, minimalist design. A small pool and several palm trees are visible in the backyard area, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping is well-maintained, with trees arranged in a semi-circular pattern around the house. The overall setting suggests a private, upscale urban residence with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and various trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a cluster of trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, palm trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with a clear look at the pool, backyard landscaping, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Side-rear view displaying the side elevation, pool area, and a mix of surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large rear windows
